freeCourses.subTitle: Completely Free
freeCourses.Title: Free Tajweed & Quran Sciences Courses
freeCourses.description: Authentic and specialized educational content accessible anytime, anywhere — certified instructors, clear explanations, and practical    examples.

contentSide.besmAllah: In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious
contentSide.description: A specialized academy for Quran recitation and Tajweed sciences for all levels — free recorded courses and live sessions via Zoom with certified instructors.

visualSide.ayah: And whoever believes in God and does righteous deeds
visualSide.todayLesson: Today's Lesson — Rules of Noon Sakinah

liveSessions.subTitle: Live Sessions
liveSessions.title: Live Sessions via Zoom with Certified Instructors
liveSessions.description: Direct interaction with the instructor, immediate pronunciation correction, and personal progress tracking — an irreplaceable learning experience.
liveSessions.zoomBoxTitle: Face-to-Face Learning from Anywhere in the World
liveSessions.zoomBoxDescription: After enrollment you'll receive your personal Zoom link. The student meets the instructor at a pre-scheduled time for live practice and immediate correction.

testimonials.subTitle: Student Reviews
testimonials.title: What Do Our Students Say?
